info.name: Phase 6 — Final Package Delivery (Per-Video Flow)
info.description:
Phase 6 Final Package Delivery — Per-Video Independent Review Flow.

── WORKFLOW ──────────────────────────────────────────
1. Agency creates package + first video (one call)
2. Agency adds more videos one-by-one (optional)
3. Each video has its OWN independent flow:
   MEDICAL_REVIEW → BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW → AWAITING_APPROVER → APPROVED
4. At MEDICAL_REVIEW — two PARALLEL tracks per video:
   Track A (Video):    Medical Affairs reviews video file
   Track B (Metadata): Brand reviews each thumbnail individually,
                       then approves/rejects title/desc/tags/thumbnails
5. When BOTH tracks APPROVED → video moves to BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW
6. Brand approves video quality → AWAITING_APPROVER
7. Content Approver APPROVES only (cannot reject) → APPROVED
8. Phase 7 auto-triggers when first video reaches APPROVED

── KEY RULES ─────────────────────────────────────────
• Package has NO status — it is just a named container
• Each video is 100% independent (no coupling)
• Thumbnails: Brand reviews each one individually (APPROVED/REJECTED + comment)
• All thumbnails must be reviewed before Brand can approve metadata track
• If ANY thumbnail REJECTED → Brand must reject metadata track
• Content Approver CANNOT reject (approve only)
• Only SUPER_ADMIN can withdraw a video
• Agency CANNOT withdraw

── AUTO-SAVED COLLECTION VARIABLES ──────────────────
Run Login folder first — tokens are auto-saved.
Run 1.1 to auto-save packageId, video1Id, asset1Id, thumb1Id, thumb2Id.
Run 1.2 to auto-save video2Id, asset2Id, thumb3Id.

── SET MANUALLY ──────────────────────────────────────
scriptId → a LOCKED script whose First Cut video is APPROVED

exec: if (j.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('adminToken', j.token); console.log('✅ adminToken saved'); }
if (j.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('brandToken', j.token); console.log('✅ brandToken saved'); }

request.description:
Login as Content Brand.
Auto-saves → {{brandToken}}

Content Brand can:
- At MEDICAL_REVIEW: review each thumbnail (PATCH /thumbnails/:id/review), then approve/reject METADATA TRACK
- At BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW: approve/reject video quality

exec: if (j.token) { pm.collectionVariables.set('agencyToken', j.token); console.log('✅ agencyToken saved'); }

request.description:
Login as Agency POC.
Auto-saves → {{agencyToken}}

Agency POC can: create package, add videos, resubmit-video, resubmit-metadata, update package name.
Agency CANNOT withdraw — only Super Admin can.

Get a presigned S3 URL to upload a video file.

Response:
  uploadUrl → PUT your video binary here (no auth header needed)
  fileUrl   → save this, use it in the create/add-video request
  key       → S3 object key

assetType: 'video' or 'thumbnail'

Get a presigned S3 URL to upload a thumbnail image.
Call once per thumbnail option.
assetType: 'thumbnail'

exec: // Save first video's IDs from the videos array
if (thumbs[0]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb1Id', thumbs[0].id); console.log('✅ thumb1Id:', thumbs[0].id); }
if (thumbs[1]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb2Id', thumbs[1].id); console.log('✅ thumb2Id:', thumbs[1].id); }

request.description:
Agency creates the package container AND submits the first video in one call.

NOTE: 'video' is a single object (NOT an array). Agency picks type: LONG_FORM or SHORT_FORM.

Preconditions:
  - scriptId must be a LOCKED script
  - First Cut video for that script must be APPROVED (Phase 5 done)
  - Only 1 package allowed per script

Auto-saves: packageId, video1Id, asset1Id, thumb1Id, thumb2Id

On success:
  video.status = MEDICAL_REVIEW
  video.videoTrackStatus = PENDING
  video.metadataTrackStatus = PENDING
  Both tracks start simultaneously — no waiting.

exec: if (thumbs[0]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb3Id', thumbs[0].id); console.log('✅ thumb3Id:', thumbs[0].id); }

request.description:
Agency adds one or more videos to the existing package.

Request body MUST wrap entries in a `videos` array (backend validation).
Each item uses the same shape as `video` on POST /api/packages.

This video immediately starts its OWN independent MEDICAL_REVIEW flow.
It does NOT affect Video 1's review progress — completely independent.

Agency can add videos at any time, even while other videos are being reviewed.

Auto-saves: video2Id, asset2Id, thumb3Id

item.name: 2 — MEDICAL_REVIEW: Track A — Medical Affairs (Video Track)

request.description:
Medical Affairs approves the VIDEO TRACK for Video 1 at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Effect:
  videoTrackStatus → APPROVED
  If metadataTrackStatus is also APPROVED → video.status → BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW
  Otherwise → stays at MEDICAL_REVIEW (waiting for Brand to finish metadata)

Run for each video independently (change video1Id to video2Id for the other).

Medical Affairs rejects the VIDEO TRACK for Video 1 at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Rules:
  - field must be 'VIDEO' for Medical Affairs (they only review video files)
  - At least 1 item in itemFeedback must have a non-empty comment
  - overallComments is optional

Effect:
  videoTrackStatus → REJECTED
  metadataTrackStatus stays UNCHANGED (independent)
  video.status stays MEDICAL_REVIEW

Agency must fix and call: POST /videos/:videoId/resubmit-video

Medical Affairs approves the VIDEO TRACK for Video 2.
Videos are completely independent — approving Video 2 has zero effect on Video 1.

item.name: 3 — MEDICAL_REVIEW: Track B — Brand Reviews Thumbnails + Metadata

request.description:
Brand reviews a single thumbnail — APPROVED.

Brand must review EVERY thumbnail individually before they can approve or reject the metadata track.

Rules:
  - status: 'APPROVED' or 'REJECTED'
  - comment is OPTIONAL when approving
  - comment is REQUIRED when rejecting
  - Only works at MEDICAL_REVIEW stage
  - Only Brand or Super Admin can review thumbnails

Brand reviews a thumbnail — REJECTED.

Comment is REQUIRED when rejecting. If you send REJECTED without a comment:
  → { success: false, message: 'A comment is required when rejecting a thumbnail' }

Even 1 REJECTED thumbnail means Brand CANNOT approve the metadata track.
Brand must then reject the metadata track → Agency resubmits metadata → Brand reviews new thumbnails again.

Brand approves thumbnail for Video 2.
Each video's thumbnails are reviewed independently.

Brand approves the METADATA TRACK for Video 1 at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

PREREQUISITE: ALL thumbnails for this video's current version must be reviewed (none PENDING).
If any thumbnail is still PENDING:
  → { success: false, message: 'Cannot approve metadata — X thumbnail(s) have not been reviewed yet.' }
If any thumbnail is REJECTED:
  → { success: false, message: 'Cannot approve metadata — X thumbnail(s) are rejected. Reject the metadata track so Agency can fix them.' }

No thumbnailSelections needed — Brand already reviewed each thumbnail individually.

Effect:
  metadataTrackStatus → APPROVED
  If videoTrackStatus also APPROVED → video.status → BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW
  Otherwise stays MEDICAL_REVIEW

Brand rejects the METADATA TRACK for Video 1 at MEDICAL_REVIEW.

Valid field values for metadata rejection: TITLE, DESCRIPTION, TAGS, THUMBNAIL
At least 1 item must have hasIssue: true AND a non-empty comment.

Effect:
  metadataTrackStatus → REJECTED
  videoTrackStatus stays UNCHANGED (independent)
  video.status stays MEDICAL_REVIEW

Agency must fix and call: POST /videos/:videoId/resubmit-metadata
Brand approves metadata for Video 2. Independent from Video 1.

item.name: 4.1 Agency — Resubmit Video File (after video track rejected) 🔄

exec: var latest = assets.reduce(function(a, b) { return a.version > b.version ? a : b; }, {});
console.log('✅ asset1Id updated to v' + latest.version + ':', latest.id);
if (thumbs[0]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb1Id', thumbs[0].id); console.log('✅ thumb1Id updated'); }
if (thumbs[1]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb2Id', thumbs[1].id); console.log('✅ thumb2Id updated'); }

request.description:
Agency resubmits a new video FILE only after videoTrackStatus = REJECTED.

Only send: fileUrl, fileName (and optional fileType, fileSize).
DO NOT send title, description, tags, or thumbnails — they are AUTOMATICALLY COPIED from the current version.

Important: Thumbnails are copied WITH their existing APPROVED/REJECTED status preserved.
Brand does NOT need to re-review thumbnails when only the video file changed.

Effect:
  currentVersion increments
  videoTrackStatus → PENDING (medical reviews again)
  metadataTrackStatus stays unchanged

Auto-saves: updated asset1Id, thumb1Id, thumb2Id

item.name: 4.2 Agency — Resubmit Metadata (after metadata track rejected) 🔄

exec: var latest = assets.reduce(function(a, b) { return a.version > b.version ? a : b; }, {});
console.log('✅ asset1Id updated to v' + latest.version + ':', latest.id);
if (thumbs[0]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb1Id', thumbs[0].id); console.log('✅ thumb1Id updated'); }
if (thumbs[1]) { pm.collectionVariables.set('thumb2Id', thumbs[1].id); console.log('✅ thumb2Id updated'); }
} else { console.error('❌ Resubmit metadata failed:', JSON.stringify(j)); }

request.description:
Agency resubmits new METADATA + THUMBNAILS only after metadataTrackStatus = REJECTED.

Send: title, description, tags, thumbnails (all new thumbnails).
DO NOT send fileUrl or fileName — the video file is AUTOMATICALLY COPIED.

All new thumbnails start with status: PENDING.
Brand must re-review ALL thumbnails from scratch.

Effect:
  currentVersion increments
  metadataTrackStatus → PENDING (brand reviews again)
  videoTrackStatus stays unchanged

Auto-saves: updated asset1Id, thumb1Id, thumb2Id

Brand approves the OVERALL VIDEO QUALITY at BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW.

This is Brand's second review — they saw metadata at MEDICAL_REVIEW, now they check the full video experience.
No thumbnail re-review needed here.

Effect:
  video.status → AWAITING_APPROVER
  Content Approver can now act

item.name: 5.2 Brand — Reject Video Quality ❌ (goes back to MEDICAL_REVIEW)

request.description:
Brand rejects video quality at BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW.

Use field: 'VIDEO' — this is a video quality rejection.

Effect:
  video.status → MEDICAL_REVIEW (goes back!)
  videoTrackStatus → REJECTED
  metadataTrackStatus stays APPROVED (metadata does NOT reset)

Agency only needs to resubmit the video file (not metadata).
Medical re-approves video → both tracks APPROVED again → comes back to BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW.

item.name: 6.1 Content Approver — Final Approve ✅ (triggers Phase 7 if first APPROVED)

request.description:
Content Approver gives FINAL APPROVAL at AWAITING_APPROVER.

Content Approver CANNOT reject. This endpoint is APPROVE ONLY for Content Approver at this stage.
If you try to reject → { success: false, message: 'Cannot reject video at stage: AWAITING_APPROVER' }

Effect:
  video.status → APPROVED
  video.lockedById = approver's userId
  video.lockedAt = now

If this is the FIRST APPROVED video in the package:
  → Phase 7 is automatically triggered backend-side
  → No frontend action needed

item.name: 6.2 Content Approver — Try to Reject (should FAIL) ❌

request.description:
EXPECTED TO FAIL — Content Approver cannot reject at any stage.

Expected response:
{ "success": false, "message": "Cannot reject video at stage: AWAITING_APPROVER" }

Content Approver is approve-only in Phase 6.

Super Admin withdraws a video from any active stage.

Only Super Admin can withdraw — Agency POC cannot.
Withdrawal is a TERMINAL state — no un-withdraw endpoint exists.
Agency can add a brand new video if they need to resubmit.

Effect: video.status → WITHDRAWN
Errors:
  { success: false, message: 'Only Super Admin can withdraw a video' }  ← if not admin
  { success: false, message: 'Video is already withdrawn' }             ← if already done

item.name: 7.2 Super Admin — Approve Video Track (override Medical Affairs)

request.description: Super Admin approves the video track at MEDICAL_REVIEW, acting as Medical Affairs.
Super Admin can review thumbnails, acting as Brand.

Get the full package with all videos, their assets, thumbnails, and reviews.

Returns package object with videos[] array.
Each video has its own status, videoTrackStatus, metadataTrackStatus, currentVersion.

To get the current version's asset:
  const currentAsset = video.assets.find(a => a.version === video.currentVersion)

Get a single video with its full details: assets, thumbnails (with status/comment), and reviews.

Useful for reviewer detail views.

Get all version snapshots for a video.

Returns: { videoId, currentVersion, totalVersions, versions: [{version, asset, reviews}] }

Each version has the asset snapshot (fileUrl, title, thumbnails) and reviews made during that version.
CurrentVersion increments each time Agency calls resubmit-video or resubmit-metadata.

Get the review queue for the current user.

Medical Affairs → sees videos at MEDICAL_REVIEW where videoTrackStatus = PENDING
Content Brand   → sees videos at MEDICAL_REVIEW where metadataTrackStatus = PENDING + all BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW
Approver        → sees videos at AWAITING_APPROVER
Agency          → sees their own submitted videos
Super Admin     → sees all videos
Brand's queue: videos at MEDICAL_REVIEW with metadataTrackStatus=PENDING + all BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW videos.
Content Approver's queue: videos at AWAITING_APPROVER.

Get videos previously reviewed by the current user.
decision: APPROVED or REJECTED

Auth: Medical Affairs, Content Brand, Content Approver only.
Get videos Brand has previously rejected.

item.name: 9 — Error / Negative Cases (all should return errors)

request.description:
Expected error if script not locked:
{ success: false, message: 'Cannot create package — script is not yet locked (current: DRAFT)' }

Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'A comment is required when rejecting a thumbnail' }

item.name: 9.3 ❌ Brand approves metadata while thumbnails still PENDING

request.description:
Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'Cannot approve metadata — X thumbnail(s) have not been reviewed yet. Review each thumbnail before approving.' }

item.name: 9.4 ❌ Medical rejects without any comment in itemFeedback

request.description:
Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'At least one item must have a rejection comment' }

item.name: 9.5 ❌ Agency resubmits video when track is not rejected

request.description:
Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'Cannot resubmit video file — video track is not rejected (current: PENDING)' }

item.name: 9.6 ❌ Medical tries to approve at BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW

request.description:
Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'Role MEDICAL_AFFAIRS cannot approve video at stage BRAND_VIDEO_REVIEW' }

Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'Only Brand/Content team can review thumbnails' }

Run this AFTER 2.1 (Medical already approved). Expected error:
{ success: false, message: 'Medical Affairs has already approved the video track for this submission cycle' }
